benefits.description: Endometriosis pain reduction; experienced entire day without pain after 3 years of daily pain
Reduction in surgical scarring appearance in bikini area
General improvement to quality of life

protocol_notes: 5 mg vial reconstituted with 3-4 mL bacteriostatic water. Used 29G 1CC insulin syringe with 20 tick mark pulls. 10 ticks suspended in water and ingested orally; 10 ticks injected subcutaneously in thigh or abdomen. Later switched to 30G 1/2 inch needles. Also taking Meldonium/Mexidol and Lithium. Nerve-blocker injections planned separately. Planning to cycle off after 28 days to monitor effects. Compounded pharmacy source verified with facility tour. Female, small frame, low body fat.
